LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT VICENTE CAMPOS' NOTICE OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. DEFENDANT SERVED PLAINTIFF BY MAIL ON JUNE 1. THAT IS 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PURSUANT TO CCP 1005 (B), BECAUSE THE PAPERS WERE SERVED BY MAIL AN ADDITIONAL 5 CALENDAR DAYS NOTICE WAS REQUIRED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Jugment
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VICENTE CAMPOS LEFT BEFORE THE CASE WAS CALLED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.

DEFENDANT VICENTE CAMPOS' Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is denied for insufficient notice. Defendant served plaintiff by mail on June 1. That is 16 court days before the hearing. Pursuant to CCP 1005 (b), because the papers were served by mail an additional 5 calendar days notice was required. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558. (301/JLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Ot Set Aide Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-01-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
VICENTE CAMPOS, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415) 387-2473, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
NO APPEARANCE OF PLAINTIFF

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT VICENTE CAMPOS' Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment IS DENIED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (301/JLW) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
